holdings.infoBox: EWY is an equity ETF with a total of 88 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 24.67%, Samsung Electronics at 22.96%, SK Square at 3.82%, Samsung Electro-Mechanics at 3.22%, and Hyundai Motor Company at 2.07%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI South Korea ETF (EWY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Korea 25-50 index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap Korean firms. EWY was launched on May 9, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Bank of Korea Warns Inflation May Stay Elevated Despite Middle East Truce
data.text: South Korea is likely to see elevated inflation for a prolonged period as higher energy costs spread into the broader economy and creates fresh risks for policymakers, the Bank of Korea said.

data.title: Asian Currencies Consolidate Before Decision by Warsh-Led FOMC
data.text: Asian currencies consolidated against the dollar before first decision by a FOMC led by Chairman Kevin Warsh later.

data.text: Gov. Shin Hyun-song 's remarks will likely reinforce market expectations that the central bank will resume tightening as soon as next month.

data.text: The Kospi Composite Index jumped by nearly 10% today, June 12, and moved closer to the all-time high. It jumped to KRW 8,430, a few points below the record high of KRW 8,925.
